subject: [SO] Remove so-secret component
commit_message:
[SO] Remove so-secret component

SO secret was used to give truststore to SO components.
As we're using dynamic certificate retrieval, it's not needed anymore.

Issue-ID: OOM-2534
Issue-ID: SO-3348
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I0eb2e052096923fc69bf5f1a1876d9a76a22102b

(1 comment)

@Andrew, sorry I've seen your comment after starting to follow @Waqas request :/

I've changed to use "file:" in override.yaml as it seemed to be your (Waqas and yourself) preference.
I've also updated some old hardcoded references to truststore/keystore so let's see if it's OK!

Again, if you prefer to do it the other way (use your change who would need to be updated in order to remove 'file:/' in etsi deployment.yaml), please tell me, I'll rebase this one on top of yours!

Patch Set 2:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/6241/

> 
> @Andrew, sorry I've seen your comment after starting to follow @Waqas request :/
> 
> I've changed to use "file:" in override.yaml as it seemed to be your (Waqas and yourself) preference.
> I've also updated some old hardcoded references to truststore/keystore so let's see if it's OK!
> 
> Again, if you prefer to do it the other way (use your change who would need to be updated in order to remove 'file:/' in etsi deployment.yaml), please tell me, I'll rebase this one on top of yours!

I'm ok with you making change under etsi-catalog-manager for trust-store: file:${TRUSTSTORE}
- if this goes through, I can abandon my review.

k exec -it onap-so-vnfm-adapter-6bf6b74c5-grv85 -- sh
aai:
  auth: 2A11B07DB6214A839394AA1EC5844695F5114FC407FF5422625FB00175A3DCB8A1FF745F22867EFA72D5369D599BBD88DA8BED4233CF5586
  version: v15
  endpoint: https://aai.onap:8443
spring:
  security:
    usercredentials:
    - username: vnfm
      password: '$2a$10$Fh9ffgPw2vnmsghsRD3ZauBL1aKXebigbq3BB1RPWtE62UDILsjke'
      role: BPEL-Client
    - username: mso_admin
      password: '$2a$10$Fh9ffgPw2vnmsghsRD3ZauBL1aKXebigbq3BB1RPWtE62UDILsjke'
      role: ACTUATOR
server:
  port: 9092
  ssl:
    key-alias: so@so.onap.org
    key-store-password: ${KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
    key-store: file:${KEYSTORE}
    key-store-type: PKCS12
http:
  client:
    ssl:
      trust-store: file:${TRUSTSTORE}
      trust-store-password: ${TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
mso:
  key: 07a7159d3bf51a0e53be7a8f89699be7
  site-name: localSite
  logPath: ./logs/vnfm-adapter
  config:
    cadi:
      cadiLoglevel: DEBUG
      cadiKeyFile: /opt/app/osaaf/local/org.onap.so.keyfile
      cadiTrustStore: /opt/app/osaaf/local/org.onap.so.trust.jks
      cadiTruststorePassword: ${TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
      cadiLatitude: 38.4329
      cadiLongitude: -90.43248
      aafEnv: IST
      aafApiVersion: 2.1
